# uptimekuma_notification_techuluspush (Resource)

TechulusPush notification resource

## Example Usage

```terraform
resource "uptimekuma_notification_techuluspush" "example" {
  name       = "TechulusPush Notifications"
  api_key    = "your-techulus-push-api-key"
  title      = "Uptime Kuma Alert"
  channel    = "monitoring"
  is_active  = true
  is_default = false
}

resource "uptimekuma_notification_techuluspush" "urgent" {
  name           = "TechulusPush Urgent Alerts"
  api_key        = "your-techulus-push-api-key"
  title          = "URGENT: Uptime Kuma"
  sound          = "alarm"
  time_sensitive = true
  is_active      = true
  is_default     = true
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `api_key` (String, Sensitive) Techulus Push API key for authentication
- `name` (String) Notification name

### Optional

- `apply_existing` (Boolean)
- `channel` (String) Push notification channel
- `is_active` (Boolean)
- `is_default` (Boolean)
- `sound` (String) Notification sound identifier
- `time_sensitive` (Boolean) Whether the notification is time-sensitive
- `title` (String) Notification title

### Read-Only

- `id` (Number) Notification identifier
